messages.text: I’d like everyone to give our new competitor Amie a warm welcome
It’s going to take everyone working round the clock in shifts to stop Tom scoring a hatrick every day
Nah im on 1500 calories a day at the minute so that puts a spanner in the works
I’ll sack it off for the game im sure
Also just got a new car
Ruddy heck what was wrong with last one
If you score a hat trick or have an away pint
Obviously the 2nd picture doesn’t work towards another Hattie tho
Cos i feel like its very forgettable
Tis the only way without some bookie aaah programming from Rob
This is gonna have to be the system 🤣
Unless we had a universal image for hatrick
To send in when we score one
You’d still have the issue for away goals tho
May as well just send two pics I think
And this for an away goal? 🤣
What did u type for that ahhaah
I reckon any hatrick gif and any plane gif will do
Cos then it’s easier to see when scrolling
Won’t even spell her name right. Poor sportsmanship Tomas
He did this in the last chat as well lmao
Do the emojis and just increment the pint counter properly
Only a lil slip of the finger
If it’s an away goal, I think you should just be able to react to it with a plane emoji and I can count it as double
I’ll check if it’s possible tho
I don’t believe it’s kick off yet
It did say in the opening message dom sent I believe or one of
Or on the last chat perhaps
If we don’t have rules then what are we as a society
He won last season and now he wants to make a mockery of the league
He got a tinpot golden boot
A wooden spoon of a prize
He thinks he should’ve won last season and now he wants to make a mockery of the league?
Btw are we doing most pints this season or are we still doing first to 1500?
Can’t call it a league if the first 5 months mean nothing
Also what’s going on with this sweepstakes?
Too fuckin late for it now
Excellent boys 1 min in a 5 pints
The pub we’re in is showing it on ITVX so we will have to mute the chat unfortunately
Thats so shit why woud they do that
On this form we’ll be done in 5 hours
Everyone give a warm welcome to season 2 inductee - the Hog @48614768406724
Tom likes cock pass it on
Does anyone have Rhys’ number? Could we add him to make up for high school lol
I also gave him my card to pay for it and he subsequently left it outside the toilet doors
Averaging the same numbers of pints per hour lil bro
Half your age + 7 doesn’t even work for 19
Gonna need VAR on this one
16yr old girls I thought it was 16yr old boys
How many people were with him who can confirm he did in fact fancy a 16 year old?
Me Thomas and my mate Joe
A jury of your own peers
What do you have to say for yourself Tom?
Got my office summer party tonight
I remember my first pint waheyyy
Gonna be a tough one to get through but the venue is a banger so we have to soldier on
Yh cos it was this year u cunt
Was trying to split the G boss
But wes beat me to it
No you didn’t bet you were already there
Also the nav is the most goated pub
Wanted the debut into the chat to be memorable
I’m working from home coz I’m fucking hungover so I can stop the hattie
Ngl I’m pretty sure a single sip would make me chun tbf
Our work party didn’t have enough food
Nah, planning on being unemployed soon
Worst part was the people refilling drinks were coming as often as the people with the canapés
So for each morsel of food about the size of a pound coin I was necking a glass of champagne
Thank god Amie stopped the hattie attempt
Going another 1 in a min dw
Could Amie be on for a hattie herself now?
No way I was cutting in there
Speeds the name of the game
I reckon he was double parking just to get the hattie
Nah Amie’s a man it’s fine
But you’ve got a history of poor conduct fella
So we have to keep a close eye
I’m on a train, ready to get back in the game
First pint of the season and already trying to cheat the game
I am enjoying the back and forth to try to and block the hattie. The old goat fighting allegations that he’s washed vs the exciting new challenger going for their first golden boot
Ive sacked of a diet for this game
They’re never as good when they come back after a sabbatical tho
How long did the diet last hahaha
Can you keep track of your weight for us? I’ll add it to my season-end statistics
Im gonna be doing 1500 cals or less
In fact do you have a smart watch?
Can we just track your health data
lol how about a £30 Chinese one
What the frick nah im a good boy
I mean if you think a rip off apple watch looks cool then I guess so
No dinner yet this is risky
By god he’s going for a second hattie
7 pints in 3 hours and he’s only tipsy
If you do actually diet and lose weight, your tolerance is gonna disappear so fast lmao
I got tipsy after 3 the other night
Tolerance rebuilds fast it turns out
To accommodate for the Hattie gif plz
Or this is gonna get messy fast
Need to be on top of this shit
Yeah this is not gonna work lol
It will Tom is just a mong
I reckon if you get a hattie just post it as +2 instead of +1
For the counter to be right
Media counter is gonna be fucked anyway
Can we get Paige in the chat as well
She’ll bring the pints in. Competition on
You need to send the gif
Proving to be a serious contender
Making these season 1 chumps look silly
At this rate we will be done in 2 months lmao
Get to the pub right now Tom
Im going for a pint now
Nah that will frick me off
We really might need to increase to 2000
The commission will review at the end of the month
Once more data has been collected
We might be done by then lol
But look either side of the hatty
I dont get the game then
I reckon Amie will beat you to it Tom
What a signing for the league
Had to bid an extra 30M on top of the asking price
But a sensational grab for sports fans worldwide
What’s the league’s ruling on doping?
Sniffi is like the opposite of doping
Us and the 1000 keys league have a great working relationship
You do not look like you’re enjoying that hahahah
You do realise you have to stay there for the rest of the night now right?
Guys is it just pints of beer yeah
can do a pint of vodka if you want
Put it with your picture submission
Couldn’t have started the game at a better yime
Yo chat what if I have a four pack of 500ml cans what does that count as
Dom who have u invited here
There’s a child in the midst
Bahhllrighttt hey forget I said anything, just gonna slam a scenic four pack worth absolute nish holy scenic
Should we reminisce about the 400 coronas i drank last season without score
Its a sunday where are you hog
On holiday lil bro enjoying life
Is a back to back on the cards
Quick Tom the Nav is calling
Just to check, are we saying hatties and away goals count for double? Or count for just 1 extra point?
So if you get a hattie abroad is that 4 or 3?

If people want to keep track of the pints: 
https://robjbarr.github.io/pints-analyser/
Pints over time is a bit janky rn, I’ll fix it
I believe, Rob correct me if I’m wrong, you don’t need the gifs anymore
And add a ✈️ emoji to an away pint to track it
Yeah does the pints in the chart include the extra 1
Hasn’t been tested tho so may not work lmao
Also has to be a reaction instead of part of the message
So no need for gifs now right?
But then surely the numbers still need to skip right?
Or should we just go off the total pints in the app
Oi dom look at the leaderboard
Yeah I guess just if you hit a hattie you can add 1 to your total
And in theory the page should be correct
Actually lemme test the ✈️ thing now
Joe ur getting a temporary free pint
So you want me to react to the chat with the aeroplane ✈️
No free pints when I do fix it
Chat is there a rule about a scenic Bev
there was going to be a prize for it last season
dont know if we actually gave one
So is it a go ahead
@223462954123378 do Scotland and wales count for away goals?
the board discussed this at the weekend
Board ruling - you have to cross sea, Ireland counts
Half pint or just massive head?
Would rather shit in my own mouth than be there
If you did that I’d vote you for scenic pint
Me, a pint, and shit in my mouth
People who know ball, can someone pls explain why England are so shit
People in yellow no let ball in
Ghana are so shit that they’re playing dead defensively
But their entire job is just to kick ball in net, why have they not kicked ball in net?
Sorry mate I’ve expended all the knowledge that I have
Anyone wanna move to Spain instead
Not even worth the pints that
Also looks like a half that
Rooftop view of the best city in the world, scenic
Well what’s the rule on forgetting you have to send in a pint until you’ve drank half of it
What if in this picture it just turned out to be one absolutely massive swig
Id find it hard to believe
Nah nah this was just a hypothetical question
I would’ve backed it as splitting the G
Nah trust it was mid splitting the g
Was I supposed to send the g?
Just conveniently missed the g by about half a pint below
Gonna need the ref to weigh in here
Nah swear I just miss judged it
Yeah exactly was just feeling a tad parched
It is a hot day tbf
Maybe the hog was just a bit over eager
This is a gentleman’s game remember
We do not tolerate tomfoolery in this league
This is the kind of tomfoolery we don’t tolerate
What the shid is that rob
I think this emoji shit is gonna get out of hand if u make the reactions do stuff to the table mr
Looks like hog is getting closer to the top
Hey guys don’t worry it won’t happen again apologies
Swithers needs to pull this finger out
There will be more stats coming soon
